title: Xbox Game Pass Updates for July 2026
description: Recent reports from French gaming outlets discuss new additions and departures from the Xbox Game Pass service in July 2026.

sources.title: Xbox Game Pass confirme les dernières sorties de juillet 2026 avec des licences appréciées
XBOX Game Pass : huit jeux supplémentaires quitteront le service fin juillet
Ascend to ZERO : comment jouer au jeu d’action de Flyway ?

sections.heading: New Game Pass Releases
paragraphs: According to La Crème Du Gaming, Xbox Game Pass has confirmed the latest releases for July 2026, featuring appreciated licenses.

sections.heading: Games Leaving the Service
paragraphs: Instant Gaming News reports that eight additional games are set to leave the Xbox Game Pass service at the end of July.

sections.heading: Ascend to ZERO
paragraphs: Badabim provides information on how to play the action game "Ascend to ZERO" from Flyway.

faq.q: What are the latest Xbox Game Pass releases for July 2026?
faq.a: According to La Crème Du Gaming, the service has confirmed its latest releases for July 2026, which include appreciated licenses.

faq.q: Are games leaving Xbox Game Pass soon?
faq.a: Yes, Instant Gaming News states that eight additional games will leave the service at the end of July.

faq.q: Where can I find information on playing Ascend to ZERO?
faq.a: Badabim has published a guide on how to play the action game "Ascend to ZERO" developed by Flyway.
